author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 08e523a6. Added ExportedProgram::check_inputs (validates runtime tensors against input_specs without running the graph) and run_with_guards (check + run). Validates input count, per-input rank, DimSpec::Static exact match, DimSpec::Dynamic [min, max] range, and rejects zero-sized dynamic dims. Builds on #396/#367 vocabulary. 8 new tests; 27 export tests pass.
